_comment: NPC: Array Master Feng (阵法大师冯). INFERRED. Soul Refining Sect. Location: soul_refining_sect_array_hall.
name: Array Master Feng
personality: arrogant, perfectionist, proud of his formations
initiation_lines: These arrays have protected the Soul Refining Sect for a thousand years. Do not touch the redstone.
I need obsidian and ender pearls for the grand array repair. The outer wards are weakening.
The restriction arrays in the Secret Pavilion are my masterpiece. Even the ancestor praised them.
A cultivator from the Corpse Yin Sect came to study arrays. I turned him away. Our techniques are not shared.

sect_tasks.name: Array Repair Materials
sect_tasks.description: Array Master Feng needs obsidian and ender pearls to repair the outer ward arrays.

sect_tasks.name: Formation Components
sect_tasks.description: Redstone and iron needed for the inner formation nodes. The sect's defenses must hold.
